prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.9 kg; Height 180.1 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 63.3kg; 9 months ago 57.6kg; 6 months ago 60.7kg; 3 months ago 59.1kg; current 60.9kg), Height (12 months ago 180.1cm; 9 months ago 180.1cm; 6 months ago 180.1cm; 3 months ago 180.1cm; current 180.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 72mL/min/1.73m²; current 73mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 66mg/g; 9 months ago 94mg/g; 6 months ago 97mg/g; 3 months ago 70mg/g; current 88mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 137mg/dL; 6 months ago 155mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 148mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.31 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
